channel.title: Eternal Record
channel.description: Daily cinematic mythology stories — 90-second vertical videos.
channel.itunes:author: Ayush Rana

item.title: The Blazing Wrath of Karna
item.description: Today's story will change how you see everything... In the midst of the great war of Kurukshetra, Karna stood tall as the greatest warrior the world had ever known, his chariot wheels ablaze with the fury of a thousand suns. His rage against the Pandavas knew no bounds as he recalled the injustices done to him by his own people, and the pain of being abandoned by his mother, Kunti. He rode forth, his bow sang with the power of a thousand arrows, his chariot left a trail of destruction wherever he went. His wrath was so intense that it seemed the very earth itself was burning beneath his feet. But as the battle raged on, Karna's rage consumed him, he began to lose control, striking down friend and foe alike. And in that moment of unbridled fury, he saw the face of his mother, Kunti, and his heart was filled with regret. This is Wrath — the sin that consumes us all, and destroys everything in its path. Can we learn to control our rage, or will it consume us like the flames that engulfed Karna?
